name: Saleh Under Training
overview: The events revolve around (Saleh), who works in the divorce registration department, which causes him to marry because of what he sees from the problems of couples who separate from their wives, and this complex increases. He has (Faraj) a friend and colleague in the same section, who hates women and hates marriage. Saleh's father tries to marry him to (Nawal) his son, a partner (Abu Adel), and he succeeds in doing so, but Faraj tries to thwart this marriage in various ways so that Saleh returns to his anti-woman.

trailers.title: عبدالله الحبيل في مسلسل صالح تحت التدريب - الحلقة 1
